records.ety: [OE. togedere, togidere, AS. tōgædere, tōgædre, tōgadere; tō to + gador together. √29. See To, prep., and Gather.]

defs: In company or association with respect to place or time; as, to live together in one house; to live together in the same age; they walked together to the town.
quotes: Soldiers can never stand idle long together.

defs: In or into union; into junction; as, to sew, knit, or fasten two things together; to mix things together.
quotes: The king joined humanity and policy together.

defs: In concert; with mutual cooperation; as, the allies made war upon France together.
quotes: Take the bad together with the good.
